title: Vibrant rain
description: the resource pack for player who wants clean, enhanced and lightweight rain texture pack!
body:
# 🌧️ vibrant Rain

A clean and minimal resource pack that makes Minecraft rain soft, transparent, and less distracting, while keeping a smooth and natural look.

## ✨ Features
* Smooth, blur-style rain streaks
* Lower opacity for better visibility
* Subtle custom rain particles
* Clean and minimal aesthetic


### 🧠 Why use this?
Default rain can feel heavy and block your view.
This pack keeps the atmosphere while making rain lighter, smoother, and more cinematic.

### Modpack Usage:
You are free to include this resource pack in any modpack, whether hosted on Modrinth, CurseForge, or other platforms. No explicit permission is required, though credit is always appreciated!

**Made by Duro_85** 😎

[especially made for vibrant experience!](https://modrinth.com/project/ECbnX2uw)



[try lighter version for more clear view!](https://modrinth.com/project/GpVobbF8)
